detail.description:
Epic Stickman: Unleash Your Inner Legend in the Shadow Realm 

Epic Stickman: Idle RPG War is a thrilling idle RPG adventure where darkness reigns and your stickman hero fights even while you’re offline. In this AFK auto-battle game, your legend never sleeps — only grows stronger. The realm of shadows is calling. Are you ready to answer?

◈ Idle RPG Action That Never Stops
Battle through hordes of monsters and earn epic rewards — even when you're away. Enjoy seamless auto-battle mechanics that l
